text:
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://elsie.nci.nih.gov/pub/.
fetch: ftp://elsie.nci.nih.gov/pub/tzdata2007c.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)

=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/misc/zoneinfo

Fix: 

change version from 2007c to 2007d
How-To-Repeat: make fetch in misc/zoneinfo port
